Oblivious ML-Ops (OMLO), a framework for privacy-preserving machine learning infrastructure that enables training and serving of ML models while hiding data-dependent access patterns.

Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

A machine learning forecasting framework for energy commodity markets integrating macroeconomic indicators, statistical models (e.g., SVR), and deep learningbased prediction approaches.

A Multi-Layered Security Framework for Digital Payments: Behavioral Biometrics-Based Fraud Detection Using Machine Learning.  The objective of the research is to enhance digital payment security by combining behavioral biometrics with machine learning - based fraud detection.

An end-to-end machine learning based model that predicts the diseases of different plants from the picture of the leaf and provides the solution for that disease. Built using Flask framework.
Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.
A multivariate machine learning framework for predicting student stress levels with 90%+ accuracy.

A real-time, microservices-based machine learning trading framework integrating MetaTrader 4/5 via DWX Connect. It ingests DWX tick data, processes them through Kafka streams to generate candles and technical indicators and generates automated trading signals.

In competitive industries like telecoms, retaining customers is as vital as gaining them. Using real-world data, this churn research project analyzes why users leave and how to stop it. By leveraging machine learning and predictive modeling, I translate data into business strategies, creating a framework to maintain an engaged, loyal customer base.
Workshop websites for an Empirical Framework for Robust Machine Learning Systems and its Application in AI4L

Elastic Guardian is a modular AI framework that structures machine learning projects from research and prototyping to scalable deployment. It emphasizes clean architecture, reproducible pipelines, model evaluation, optimization, and API integration to transform experimental ML workflows into production-ready systems.
A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

This project is a Digital Twinbased predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.
Code base for: A unified framework for evaluating robustness of Machine Learning Interpretability for Prospect Risking

This project presents a physics-inspired spacecraft telemetry simulation and anomaly detection framework that models power, thermal, and communication subsystems in Low Earth Orbit. It combines engineering-based thresholds and machine learning to analyze synthetic telemetry and study fault detection and spacecraft health monitoring.

Framework  for comprehensive variant detection in whole genome sequences using advanced machine learning models for cross domain pattern recognition in fitness, pharmacogenetics and nutritional aspects of sprint running

This project is a comprehensive machine learning application developed as part of my learning journey during the **YBI Foundation 45-Days Internship Program**. The application demonstrates practical implementation of data science concepts, machine learning algorithms, and web development skills using modern Python frameworks.
This Repository Consists of Problem solving using JavaScript and Machine learning using JavaScript Frameworks

Reproducible framework for forecasting and optimizing green hydrogen production from solar-powered electrolysis using physics-informed feature engineering, interpretable machine learning (SHAP/LIME), and scenario analysis. Includes public data pipeline, Python notebooks, figures, and LaTeX tables for full transparency.
Machine Learning framework for proactive risk management. Predicts high-risk departments using operational data and ensemble methods (Random Forest, GBM)
DistroML is an enterprise-grade distributed machine learning training framework designed to accelerate deep learning workflows across multiple GPUs, nodes, and cloud environments.
LifeLine AI: Emergency Response Time Optimizer LifeLine AI is an end-to-end machine learning framework designed to minimize emergency response times for ambulances and fire services.

PLS-SEM and machine learning framework for assessing AI governance readiness in public universities.

Ethos-AI is a specialized framework or platform designed to integrate ethical considerations directly into the development and deployment of artificial intelligence. It focuses on ensuring that machine learning models are not just efficient, but also fair, transparent, and accountable.
A dependently-typed machine learning framework for Lean 4, providing compile-time tensor shape verification.

Reinforcement learning framework for agricultural robots using n step and Double DQN policy learning to optimize spraying, planting, and harvesting decisions. Designed for integration with real machine vision pipelines to enable perception driven, resource efficient autonomous farm labor.
Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

Machine learning framework for EEG-based anesthesia brain-state prediction using a derived Kaggle dataset.

A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.
A repository focused on implementing machine learning frameworks and statistical methods to predict the closing price of a stock

A probabilistic forecasting framework for the 2026 FIFA World Cup built using historical international match data, statistical goal models, machine learning benchmarks, and full tournament Monte Carlo simulation.  This project focuses on probability quality, model comparison, and realistic tournament forecasting under uncertainty.

ML-Potion is all about crafting your own machine-learning elixir using the ingredients and frameworks you prefer. Think of the library as a set of building blocksatoms, steps, and componentsthat you can mix, match, and sequence to build a fully customized training or inference pipeline.

sm2rain_hydroai is an AI-enhanced SM2RAIN framework for estimating rainfall from satellite soil moisture. It combines physical inversion with machine learning and deep learning to improve rainfall reconstruction, extreme event monitoring, and hydrologic analysis across climates and regions.

This project analyzes time-varying volatility in financial markets using a GARCH(1,1) framework and compares it with machine-learningbased volatility estimation. The study focuses on volatility clustering, regime behavior, and model robustness across calm and stress periods rather than return prediction.
A unified framework for machine learning with time series

Machine learningdriven prediction of harmful algal blooms in Niger Delta coastal waters using synthetic remote sensing and water quality data, demonstrating an early warning framework for coastal ecosystem monitoring, environmental risk assessment, and decision support in data-scarce regions.

An advanced threat detection framework that integrates signature-based matching with machine learning anomaly detection to identify zero-day vulnerabilities. It features a distributed ML pipeline utilizing secure aggregation for privacy-preserving intelligence sharing and custom-built parsers to normalize logs

End-to-end ML pipeline for analyzing and mitigating bias in machine learning models. Features bias detection (SPD, EOD, DIR metrics), multiple classifiers (Random Forest, Logistic Regression, SVM), and a configurable YAML-driven training framework.
A machine learning project handling class imbalances and cost-sensitive learning towards improving fraud detection frameworks. In fulfillment of ML3301.
Hybrid ensemble machine learning and deep learning framework for accurate and explainable software cost estimation.

Passive DNS threat detection using lexical machine learning techniques. This repository contains a reproducible research prototype and experimental evaluation framework for assessing the feasibility, accuracy, and performance of machine-learning-based malicious domain detection in a passive DNS monitoring context.
A Python framework for N-agent collective learning using Tsetlin Machines and synthetic data sharing, supporting zero-shot sensor onboarding and LLM-driven feature extraction.

AltCredAI is an AI-powered alternate credit scoring framework designed to expand lending access to unbanked individuals and MSMEs.This project uses machine learning models to estimate Probability of Default (PD) from alternative financial signals and converts PD into an interpretable credit score with fairness auditing and explainability.

A Python-based machine learning framework that predicts Tesla's daily stock returns by combining FinBERT transformer sentiment analysis of Elon Musk's tweets with traditional OHLCV technical indicators. The sentiment-enhanced model achieved a statistically significant R improvement of 0.5% over the baseline, validated through bootstrap resampling.
This project is my hands-on portfolio to deepen understanding of machine learning and deep learning pipelines.

A from-scratch machine learning regression demo that implements linear regression using NumPy without relying on high-level ML libraries. The project focuses on understanding gradient descent, loss functions, and model evaluation at a fundamental level. It demonstrates core ML concepts rather than just using prebuilt frameworks.
Go bindings to Apple's CoreML framework for high-performance machine learning inference on Apple Silicon.
Build and deploy machine learning models with Pontos, an efficient framework that simplifies workflows using Python, PyTorch, and Docker.

This project explores time series forecasting using powerful machine learning approaches: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural networks, XGBoost regression, FbProphet using Tensor flow, Keras, Scikit Frameworks.

BioGraphX is a comprehensive framework for extracting biophysical features from protein sequences using graph-theoretical approaches. The system models proteins as interaction networks where residues form nodes and biochemical interactions form edges, enabling sophisticated feature extraction for downstream machine learning applications

A comprehensive and extensible ontology for systematically modeling fairness notions, metrics, biases, evaluation methods, and scientific provenance in machine learning. This ontology provides researchers, developers, and practitioners with a unified, machine-readable framework to guide the design and assessment of fair ML systems.
